PunchRecord.title: Punch Record
PunchRecord.description: Represents a single shift block of clock-in and clock-out registrations for an employee.

date.description: Date of the punch in YYYY-MM-DD representation.

clock_in_time.description: ISO timestamp representing the clock in event.

clock_out_time.description: ISO timestamp representing the clock out event, or null if active shift.

total_hours.description: Total decimal duration of the clocked shift, or null if active shift.

/punches/{punchId}.description: Master folder containing individual attendance work logs.
